_about: Curated viral-audio registry for the Viral Audio Scout. Refresh by checking: Instagram app > create Reel > add audio > 'Trending' tab (top 50, updates every few days), tokchart.com (daily TikTok chart), heyorca.com/blog/trending-audio-for-reels-tiktok and scottsocialmarketing.com weekly lists. Trends live ~7-10 days — refresh at least weekly. NEVER bake these copyrighted tracks into API-published MP4s; they are tapped inside Instagram during manual native upload.

tracks.title: Respect
tracks.trend_use: Businesses lip-sync 'What you want, baby, I got it' to showcase products/services — empowerment anthem

tracks.title: Game Time
tracks.trend_use: World Cup 2026 hype — sports edits, gym, momentum content; great for rally/record-high market days

tracks.title: original audio — southswellicecream
tracks.trend_use: 'Deliberately confusing instructions' + text-overlay explainers — creators already use it for TAX and finance-jargon explainers; perfect fit for 5-slide market explainers

tracks.title: Janice STFU
tracks.trend_use: Default hype cue for epic moments; brands report ~20x usual performance; one of few chart tracks usable on business accounts

tracks.title: Young Hearts Run Free (45 Version)
tracks.trend_use: 'Grip' trend — balancing essentials that sum up a personality/routine; light lifestyle crossover

tracks.title: Bangladesh
tracks.trend_use: Sincere-opening-to-absurd-escalation storytelling — fits 'market expectation vs reality' angles
